description: Configuration for ontology source directories. Each entry points to a directory containing domain subdirectories with *.shacl.ttl and *.owl.ttl files.

sources.name: ontology-management-base
sources.description: ASCS ontology-management-base containing HD map, georeference, scenario, and other domain ontologies

skos.name: nl-search-concepts
skos.description: Manual SKOS concept scheme with synonyms, definitions, and relationships for natural language matching

skos.name: generated-skos
skos.description: Auto-generated SKOS concepts from SHACL sh:in enumerations (one file per domain)
